title: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all that
display_title: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all that
wikitext:
[]: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all that?             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun Jul 21, 2013 2:48 pm So anyway I watched Q a couple weeks ago and a couple things have been bugging me. As we all know, building a single eva will bankrupt a small country. I'll be getting to this poimt later, but first I want to talk about this. Anyway at the end of 2.22, we almost have third impact, but apprently it was almost enough that a good percentage of the world did get third impacted in 3.0 anyway, I'm not entirely sure what the deal is with that. What is odd to me is that the people at ground zero of this partial third impact such as Misato, Ritsuko, Gendo, etc are all fine but it looks like most of the rest of the world got pretty fucked up and possibly had a bunch of people getting tanged since we see the glowing crosses everywhere. So why is the main cast ok? Even in second impact Misato was the only survivor and from the look of things 3rd went a bit further then second did despite Kaworus interference. Now getting back to my first point, both Nerve and Wille somehow got a lot of cool shit between 2.0 and 3.0, a single eva will bankrupt a small country. How did they get this stuff, and where did they get the manpower to build this stuff? My personal theorie is once they got their act together both groups just went around and pillaged the fuck out of the less screwed up places in the world taking all their resources. So what do you guys think of these mysteries?

[]: Re: Something that's been bugging me             Quote Post by andreh » Sun Jul 21, 2013 2:58 pm Defectron wrote: What is odd to me is that the people at ground zero of this partial third impact

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Jul 21, 2013 3:34 pm If we take 3.0 preview seriously (Which is most likely canon) it would seem that Misato and the others were somewhere else (UN capturing NERV personnel part) while true 3rd impact happened in Lilith's chamber. It would be pretty bad writing if coincidentally every main character survived and minor characters only died. (Anno isn't like that) How did they get this stuff, and where did they get the manpower to build this stuff?

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sun Jul 21, 2013 4:50 pm Topic title renamed. Didn't spend much time on it, hope it's good enough. For future reference, it really doesn't help anyone to make topics with such vague titles.

[]:             Quote Post by BC Baron » Sun Jul 21, 2013 5:08 pm It is truly astounding what NERV can accomplish when it's not wasting any time, money, or manpower on non-essential side projects, like repairing the ceilings.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun Jul 21, 2013 5:37 pm Industrial civilization is most likely still around in some form or another.

[]: Re: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all th             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jul 21, 2013 5:46 pm Defectron wrote: Now getting back to my first point, both Nerve and Wille somehow got a lot of cool shit between 2.0 and 3.0, a single eva will bankrupt a small country. How did they get this stuff, and where did they get the manpower to build this stuff? My personal theorie is once they got their act together both groups just went around and pillaged the fuck out of the less screwed up places in the world taking all their resources. So what do you guys think of these mysteries?

[]: Re: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all th             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jul 21, 2013 7:25 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Ha already established Mari's mad Eva grabbing skills in its climax.

[]: Re: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all th             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jul 21, 2013 8:42 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: That had to be approved by Euro/IPEA otherwise all the tech support staff actually pushing through the launch wouldn't be helping. Pilots are completely helpless on their own unless the plug is in position and the cable is hooked up, all of which take either technical or physical manpower.

[]: Re: How did Nerv and Wille get the resources to build all th             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jul 21, 2013 9:14 pm IPEA has control of the stuff below the demarcation line in the basement and of the Euro Evas. They should be able to, and are demonstrated to do whatever they please with Eva-02. Zeruel attack sequence: Misato: Eva Unit-02? Who's piloting it? Hyuga: Unknown. We didn't issue a launch order. Someone else certainly did. Probably the same way "Task 2" was issued at the beginning of the movie for Ambassadrice Rouge. A bit later: Misato: It's too late for an Eva to intercept it on the surface. Request Europe to station Unit-02 inside the GeoFront. That pretty much confirms Euro deployed 02 on their own authority but maybe listened to Japan when asked through the proper channels. Misato: What about Unit-00? Maya: Left arm repairs are underway. It's barely operational. Misato: Once that's done, send it in to support Unit-02. Fighting without backup is too dangerous. Eva-00 and Rei were authorized to deploy. Just before she she appears on screen one of the operators is annoncing her deployment. The line is untranslated in the subs I have but I'll try to dig it up later. (EDIT: Nope. No luck. Not in the BD subs, the BD script or the CRC script and I'm not good enough to try and get it by ear.) Either way Nerv is perfectly aware what their own Evas are doing and IPEA/Euro what theirs are. They just don't see the need to communicate. Regarding Rei specifically Misato and Ritsuko just seem to forget about her becaus they're paying attention to Mari going apeshit with 02. Bring all this to Q and the Nerv/Wille split, the event would have to involve countless technical staff and other nameless mooks and not just Misato and friends. It would have probably happened very close after actual TI because you would need a drastic event to convince the masses not in the know that Gendo is bonkers and wants to destroy the world, all while avoiding interference from JSSDF (which would have probabaly been hard during TI). Evas and eventually Wunder require significant support infrastructure. You can't just dump Mari and Asuka in them and watch how far they can run away on 5 minutes battery life. Overall I think it could have been similar to EoE but instead of an invasion it was an insurrection and exile. Gendo wouldn't care because all according to keikaku. Seele probably has a comment in the margins of the Dead Sea Scrolls. It's pretty obvious whose side UN took given how international the makeup of Wunder's support fleet is. The question is IPEA because they had to have finished building 08 which as far as we know was nowhere near Japan. The complete mystery is 07, 10, 11 and 12.....

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Mon Jul 22, 2013 1:11 am If the world is messed up and underpopulated money might be pointless at that point. They were either given the resources Wille needed because well it was to save the world, or they just can freely take whatever they wanted because nobody is guarding the stuff anymore. Although considering Wille could only patch repair Unit 2 and is seemingly going to have to Frankenstein 2 and 8 together to get a workable Eva, maybe they don't have the resources to build whole Eva's. In case case 8 could have been already built somewhere and as above it was either given to them to oppose Nerv, or they just took it because nobody was watching it. As for 13, Gendo could have built it using Nerv's remaining facilities, if they are properly automated, either with Seele's granting the resources, or just taking them from the remains of Tokyo 3 since nobody is there to stop him.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Nov 07, 2014 5:19 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Misato: Eva Unit-02? Who's piloting it? Hyuga: Unknown. We didn't issue a launch order. Someone else certainly did. Probably the same way "Task 2" was issued at the beginning of the movie for Ambassadrice Rouge.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Nov 07, 2014 5:42 am ElMariachi wrote: such a huge change in the unit's organism must had necessitated huge resources in the Evangelion biologic technology, so whoever did it (NERV before the split or WILLE after it) if they had the means to make such huge genetic manipulations on their Evas,

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Nov 07, 2014 7:56 am pwhodges wrote: I conjecture that Mari brought the information enabling this development; that would seem consistent with her use of it.
